analysis: Looking at the full week, you've been getting in bed close to your 8:30 target on most nights — 8:55pm on the 8th, 8:57pm on the 9th — which is genuinely solid and the interventions are clearly doing something, because that's not accidental. The deep sleep showing up early in both those nights, around 26 minutes on the 8th and building again on the 9th, tells me your nervous system is actually landing when you lie down, not just lying there waiting. Where it gets messy is the middle-of-night waking — that 43-minute stretch around 2:30am on the 9th is the one worth noticing, not beating yourself up about, just watching. The stack you're running is working on the front end of the night; the back half is where there's still room to play.
